summary: Tested new game analytics, score submission, leaderboard features, and new game types (word_search, crossword, drag_drop). All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test scores submitted during testing for analytics verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game analytics, score submission, and leaderboard features fully tested and working. New game types (word_search, crossword, drag_drop) added to the 8 total game types. Analytics tab shows: total_games, total_plays, unique_players, average_score, and per-game stats with Ranking buttons. Leaderboard displays in game results after completion and in Analytics tab modal.

backend_analytics_endpoint.GET /api/games/analytics: PASS - returns total_games, total_plays, unique_players, average_score, game_stats
backend_analytics_endpoint.response_structure: PASS - all required fields present with correct types

backend_score_submission.missing_fields: PASS - returns 422 for missing required fields

backend_leaderboard.GET /api/games/{game_id}/leaderboard: PASS - returns sorted list of scores
backend_leaderboard.sorting: PASS - sorted by percentage descending, then time ascending

new_game_types.word_search: PASS - generates word search game via AI
new_game_types.crossword: PASS - generates crossword game via AI
new_game_types.drag_drop: PASS - generates drag & drop categorization game via AI

frontend_games_creator.8_game_types_dropdown: PASS - Quiz, Matching, Fill Blanks, True/False, Flashcards, Word Search, Crossword, Drag & Drop
frontend_games_creator.analytics_tab: PASS - shows 4 stat cards (Games Created, Times Played, Avg Score, Unique Players)
frontend_games_creator.per_game_stats: PASS - shows play_count, unique_players, avg_score, best_score per game
frontend_games_creator.ranking_button: PASS - opens leaderboard modal for each game

frontend_game_play_flow.name_input_before_game: PASS - shows name input screen before starting saved games
frontend_game_play_flow.game_results_with_leaderboard: PASS - shows leaderboard in results after game completion

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/games/generate - supports word_search, crossword, drag_drop types
